mano_cua.result_summary: poster的opacity行为正确：播放前poster完全不透明(opacity:1)，鼠标idle触发userinactive后poster保持不透明（不受autohide影响=期望行为）。播放后poster正常消失。暂停后显示冻结帧而非poster（标准播放器行为）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Poster opacity remained at 1 during userinactive state (not affected by autohide = correct expected behavior). Poster disappeared smoothly on play. Poster did not reappear on pause (normal player behavior). Core poster opacity behavior is correct per task expectations.
